## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm -r test` and `pnpm -r typecheck` pass locally
- [ ] Conventional commit title (`fix:`, `feat:`, `docs:`, `test:`, `chore:`, `refactor:`, `ci:`)
- [ ] New behavior is covered by a test (error codes are table-tested one by one)
- [ ] No hardcoded claims (sizes, counts, versions) — computed or asserted only
- [ ] Data files untouched by hand (they are generated; see CLAUDE.md)
